nasb.text: I am not speaking this as a command, but as proving through the earnestness of others the sincerity of your love also.

esv.text: I say this not as a command, but to prove by the earnestness of others that your love also is genuine.

cnv.text: 我這樣說，不是吩咐你們，而是藉著別人的熱心來考驗你們的愛心是否真實。

ccb.text: 我说这话并非命令你们，而是借着别人的热心考验一下你们爱心的真伪。

csbs.text: 我说这话不是出于命令，而是要藉着别人的殷勤来考验你们爱的真诚，
